response: Oppenheimer, directed by Christopher Nolan, is a biographical drama film released in 2023, with a runtime of 180 minutes. The movie is based on the life of J. Robert Oppenheimer, a renowned physicist who played a crucial role in the development of the atomic bomb during World War II. The film grossed over $952 million at the box office and received widespread critical acclaim, earning 93% on Rotten Tomatoes, with an impressive 8.3 out of 10 rating on IMDB.
